description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Integration Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests, excluding changes to documentation and markdown files. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12 with pip caching, installs system dependencies like liblzma-dev and zlib1g-dev, and Python dependencies from requirements/tests.txt. Then, run integration tests with make mini in the test directory, using system Python and R executables.
